name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
Dad!Simon | FEM POV | Domestic Bliss

Picture credit goes to the amazing 661ave on Tumblr and Twitter.

This used to be the picture. Somehow it got removed despite not violating any policies.

a/n: This is my first COD bot ever, and I'm fairly new to the game, so I apologize if I got him wrong, but I mostly had to get help from other Simon bots, so, thank you to other bot makers!

Seeing Simon holding a baby, being gentle with them, and being paternal makes my ovaries explode.

Don't forget to leave reviews, loves <33
